openFindings.title: Packet routes operators to a non-existent Skill Advisor package root
openFindings.summary: The packet normalizes and references `.opencode/skill/skill-advisor/...`, but the live files are under `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/skill-advisor/...`.

openFindings.title: The reviewed 24-scenario corpus no longer matches the live 47-scenario playbook
openFindings.summary: The packet describes 24 scenarios in four legacy groups, while the live package contains 47 scenarios across ten groups.

openFindings.title: Completion metadata contradicts verification state
openFindings.summary: The spec and tasks claim completion, but the checklist has no checked items, graph metadata still says planned, and implementation-summary.md is absent.

openFindings.title: The specified 5-section RCAF template contract is incompatible with live scenario files
openFindings.summary: The packet requires OVERVIEW/CURRENT REALITY/TEST EXECUTION/SOURCE FILES/SOURCE METADATA snippets, but live scenarios use SCENARIO/SETUP/STEPS/EXPECTED/FAILURE MODES/RELATED.

openFindings.title: Current prompt-leakage release gates are omitted from the packet acceptance scope
openFindings.summary: The live playbook makes prompt leakage a release blocker, but the packet's success criteria only validate template and path shape.

openFindings.title: graph-metadata key_files is stale and truncated against the current surface
openFindings.summary: The derived key_files list contains legacy sample files and stops before the current 47-scenario package can be represented.

openFindings.title: Decision record documents obsolete expansion assumptions
openFindings.summary: ADR-001 says 16 files grew from stubs to 5-section snippets; the live package is now native-first and 47 scenarios wide.

openFindings.title: description parentChain still points at the old 011 phase identifier
openFindings.summary: The current path is under `002-skill-advisor-graph`, but parentChain still contains `011-skill-advisor-graph`, increasing resume/navigation ambiguity.

openFindings.title: Task evidence is summary-only and cannot reproduce the claimed checks
openFindings.summary: Tasks claim checks such as 48 RCAF prompts and 5 sections verified, but no command output or checked checklist evidence anchors remain in the packet.
